title: aster sampsonii
intro: Aster sampsonii, also known as Sampson's aster, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This perennial plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aster sampsonii include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in salves and ointments to topically treat skin conditions and wounds.
